'''Sector 63''' was an area of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|underlevels]], possibly near the [[Wicko District]]. It contained a [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] jail.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 47|''Republic'' 47]] {{1st}}
